paragraphs: Boomcat is an amazing ZZZ tier character in the hit game JJS, it has multiple powerful Neutral options that lead to every other Neutral options it has. Its R special also help convert some of its Neutral tools into powerful M1 trading tools. So basically, it is the strongest among the strongest; you can say it is the most 'boomcat' out of them
Here is a second paragraph on why this character is goated; it is cause I said so duh.
bullets: Powerful and Flexible Neutral: The conversion of every hits into everything is crazy, you go boom boom.
Cracked M1 Trading Capabilities: It is also the best M1 merchant as well.

paragraphs: Just mashed buttons and you will win all the times
Also you should try out Blood Manipulator

notes.text: You win automatically cause you are just that guy.
Actually Vessel is so stinky that you have a slight disadvantage when going against Vessel mains.
